D7.prompt: Edit ONLY: src/pages/AppBuilder.tsx. D8.prompt: Edit ONLY: src/pages/AppBuilder.tsx. Find the single outer grid container div — it has a className containing both 'grid-cols-1' and 'lg:grid-cols-12'. Make these exact string replacements inside that className: replace 'lg:grid-cols-12' with 'md:grid-cols-12'. Then find the three child panel divs: the Settings panel div (className containing 'lg:col-span-3' or similar), the Canvas panel div ('lg:col-span-5' or similar), and the Catalog panel div ('lg:col-span-4' or similar). Replace their lg: column-span classes with 'md:col-span-3', 'md:col-span-5', and 'md:col-span-4' respectively. Change only these four class strings — do not alter any other markup, logic, or file.
D8.notes: Empty patch with claude-sonnet. Switching to kimi-k2; prompt now names exact before-strings ('lg:grid-cols-12', 'lg:col-span-3' etc.) so the model can locate them by literal text search.
